checks.name: HUD_TEXT
checks.detail: chart text hf p90=18.65 (floor 3.2) — guards 'chart letters illegible'

checks.name: CAPTION_TEXT
checks.detail: caption text hf p90=19.42 (floor 3.2) — guards 'captions generic/hard to read'

checks.name: EVENT_CADENCE
checks.detail: biggest dead gap=0.0s (max 5.0s), dead windows=[] — guards 'boring/too slow'

checks.name: BEAT_DENSITY
checks.detail: 23 distinct visual beats (need >=12, ~1 per 5s) — the picture must keep telling the story, not just move

checks.name: SCENE_STRUCTURE
checks.detail: 8 shots, 7 real transitions, 7 framings — a genuine sequence of shots (config/shot_structure.yaml)

checks.name: READABILITY
checks.detail: 1079 readable words checked, 0 too dim/low-contrast (need vis>=0.42, contrast>=2.0) — guards 'every word bright + legible'

checks.name: MUSIC
checks.detail: music source = sourced ("Reawakening" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com) - CC BY 4.0) — must be a freshly-sourced real track; synth/legacy fails (fix get_music + re-mix)

checks.name: SFX_EVENTS
checks.detail: 23 sound events, 23 verified audible — every shot sonified, events audible in the master (VISUAL_FLOW.md §5)
